title: skymoonsun/model-maestro
summary: Unified LLM Gateway that proxies multiple providers (Ollama, OpenAI-compatible) behind a single API. Enables IDEs and tools to access    multiple models via standard API formats. Manage LLM usage with per-user token limits, request logging, load balancing, model groups, and an admin dashboard.
